settings.title: Settings
settings.googleNote: Leave empty for free API (may be unstable), enter API Key for Google Cloud Translation
settings.radialShortcutDesc: Press a key combination to open the quick menu
settings.shortcutPlaceholder: Click record button to set keyboard shortcut
settings.shortcutSetupGuide: How to Set Up System Shortcuts
settings.shortcutGuideIntro: Due to Wayland security restrictions, in-app recording is for reference only. Actual shortcuts must be bound via Ubuntu system settings:
settings.shortcutGuideStep1: Open Settings → Keyboard → Keyboard Shortcuts → Custom Shortcuts
settings.shortcutGuideStep2: Click "+" to add: Name "Copy Creator — Show", Command copy-creator-ctl show
settings.shortcutGuideStep3: Add another: Name "Copy Creator — Radial", Command copy-creator-ctl radial
settings.shortcutGuideStep4: Assign your desired key combinations (suggested: Ctrl+Shift+V and Ctrl+Shift+B)
settings.shortcutGuideStep5: Ensure the control script is installed: cp scripts/copy-creator-ctl ~/.local/bin/
settings.shortcutGuideHint: Tip: The "Record" button above captures a key combination for your reference, so you can pick the same shortcut in system settings.
settings.storagePathHint: Changing file location takes effect after restart
settings.storageHint: Restart the app after saving to take effect
settings.restartHint: Storage path changed, restart required to take effect
settings.migratePrompt:
Move existing clipboard records, quick input items, and settings to the new location?

Choose "Migrate": data will be copied to the new location
Choose "Cancel": only update the path, existing data stays

clipboard.confirmDeleteAll: Delete all clipboard records? This action cannot be undone.
